ddls:
CREATE TABLE "individuals" (
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each individual */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the individual */,
  "social_security_number" TEXT /* Social Security Number of the individual */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the individual */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the individual */,
  "address_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the address of the individual */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the individual */,
  "workclass_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the workclass of the individual */,
  "fnlwgt" INTEGER /* Final weight (fnlwgt) of the individual */,
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the education level of the individual */,
  "educational_num" INTEGER /* Educational numerical value (educational-num) of the individual */,
  "marital_status_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the marital status of the individual */,
  "occupation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the occupation of the individual */,
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the relationship of the individual */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the race of the individual */,
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the gender of the individual */,
  "capital_gain" INTEGER /* Capital gains of the individual */,
  "capital_loss" INTEGER /* Capital losses of the individual */,
  "hours_per_week" INTEGER /* Hours worked per week by the individual */,
  "native_country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the native country of the individual */,
  "income" TEXT /* Income level of the individual (e.g., <=50K, >50K) */,
  "employment_status_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employment status of the individual */,
  "disability_status" INTEGER /* Indicates if the individual has a disability */,
  "veteran_status" INTEGER /* Indicates if the individual is a veteran */,
  "health_insurance" INTEGER /* Indicates if the individual has health insurance */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update time of the record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("individual_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_employment_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("employment_status_id") REFERENCES employment_statuses ("employment_status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_gender_id FOREIGN KEY ("gender_id") REFERENCES genders ("gender_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_native_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("native_country_id") REFERENCES native_countries ("native_country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_education_id FOREIGN KEY ("education_id") REFERENCES educations ("education_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_address_id FOREIGN KEY ("address_id") REFERENCES addresses ("address_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_marital_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("marital_status_id") REFERENCES marital_statuses ("marital_status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_relationship_id FOREIGN KEY ("relationship_id") REFERENCES relationships ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_workclass_id FOREIGN KEY ("workclass_id") REFERENCES workclasses ("workclass_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_occupation_id FOREIGN KEY ("occupation_id") REFERENCES occupations ("occupation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "workclasses" (
  "workclass_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each workclass */,
  "workclass_name" TEXT /* Name of the workclass */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the workclass */,
  "is_government" INTEGER /* Indicates if the workclass is in the government sector */,
  "average_salary" TEXT /* Average salary for the workclass */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("workclass_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "educations" (
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education level */,
  "education_name" TEXT /* Name of the education level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the education level */,
  "years_of_education" INTEGER /* Number of years of education */,
  "degree_level" TEXT /* Degree level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marital_statuses" (
  "marital_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marital status */,
  "marital_status_name" TEXT /* Name of the marital status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the marital status */,
  "is_married" INTEGER /* Indicates if the marital status involves being married */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("marital_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "occupations" (
  "occupation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each occupation */,
  "occupation_name" TEXT /* Name of the occupation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the occupation */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the industry of the occupation */,
  "average_hours_per_week" INTEGER /* Average hours worked per week for the occupation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("occupation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_occupations_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "relationship_name" TEXT /* Name of the relationship */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the relationship */,
  "is_family_member" INTEGER /* Indicates if the relationship is a family member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "races" (
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race */,
  "race_name" TEXT /* Name of the race */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the race */,
  "census_code" TEXT /* Census code for the race */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genders" (
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gender */,
  "gender_name" TEXT /* Name of the gender */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the gender */,
  "census_code" TEXT /* Census code for the gender */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gender_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "native_countries" (
  "native_country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each native country */,
  "native_country_name" TEXT /* Name of the native country */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the native country */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO code for the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("native_country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "addresses" (
  "address_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each address */,
  "street" TEXT /* Street address */,
  "city" TEXT /* City */,
  "state" TEXT /* State */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("address_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_addresses_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES native_countries ("native_country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employment_statuses" (
  "employment_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employment status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the employment status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the employment status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employment_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the industry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)
